description_long: This is a vintage-style metal teapot with a glossy white enamel finish, featuring a delicate floral heart motif on its side. The teapot has a rounded, slightly squat body with a wide base and a gently tapering top. Its spout is short, slightly curved, and projects from the side, while the handle is a thick, black, arched loop attached at two points on the lid's rim. The lid is circular, slightly domed, and fitted with a small, central knob for easy removal. Visible wear and chipping around the edges and handle attachments suggest age and frequent use, adding to its character. The floral decoration, primarily pink and green, stands out against the white background, giving it a charming, decorative appeal.
description: A vintage white enamel teapot with a floral heart motif, black arched handle, and domed lid, showing signs of wear and chipping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral heart motif, spout on the left, and the full arched handle.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle aligned vertically, no spout or motif visible, showing the plain back and some chipping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the floral motif and spout on the right, handle arching above.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the spout attachment and handle, with visible chipping and no motif.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, slightly curved spout angled outward from the side, positioned at the front left relative to the handle.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, black, arched loop handle attached at two points on the rim, with a slightly flattened top and robust, ergonomic form.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; circular, slightly domed lid with a small central knob, fits snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Floral heart motif in pink, green, and yellow on the side, contrasting with the white enamel background.
